name: Emmanuel Lawal
tagline: AI that ships. Not AI that demos.
bio: Forward Deployed AI Engineer based in New Jersey. I build systems where AI does real work — embedded in products, wired to real data, accountable to production. Not proof-of-concepts.

availability.label: Available for select projects
availability.details: Open to freelance builds, full-time roles, and technical consulting where AI integration needs to hold up past the demo.
